query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.username,
  u.full_name,
  u.role,
  u.is_active,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT up.permission) as user_permissions,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT up.scope_type) as scope_types
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_permissions up ON u.id = up.user_id
WHERE u.username = 'RADMAN'
GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.full_name, u.role, u.is_active;
command:
